content: This is the place to learn about my homelab and the application it is running called Carnac. More information is on my github(link is above).
title: Homelab

content:
This is the start of my Homelab.
Setting up the hardware for the Homelab. # The hardware will be one control node and three worker nodes. Lets start with the control node that will be using an old laptop running Fedora. The control node is using an AMD Ryzen 3 with 4 CPUs with 16GB RAM. On to the worker nodes which include an old desktop and 2 RPi 5. The two RPi 5 have 8GB of RAM while the old desktop has 16GB RAM. The desktop is running Ubuntu Server on an old Intel i5 with 4 CPUs.
title: Homelab
